title: Publish an independent read-only Bureau status capsule
goal: Provide bounded Bureau truth without depending on a full Grabowski operator session.

acceptance.assertion: The capsule includes registry head/hash, state integrity, runs, leases, repo balls, Doctor, Registry Truth, creation time and last successful snapshot.
Every snapshot declares age, freshness threshold and stale or unavailable state.
The capsule has no mutation, shell, claim, dispatch, merge or deploy authority.
A failure of the full Grabowski session does not prevent reading the last valid capsule.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
